title: Conciliation Proceedings. Upon receipt of the Request for Assistance, the
content: 54 assigned Conciliator shall schedule a conference between the parties to discuss the 55 possibility of arriving at an amicable settlement. 56 57 Where an amicable settlement is reached, the assigned Conciliator shall sign as witness 58 and the appropriate officer shall attest to the due execution thereof. The settlement shall 59 be final and binding upon the parties. 60 61 43 Where efforts for amicable settlement fail, the conciliation proceedings shall be 1 terminated, and the Request for Assistance shall be referred to the appropriate office for 2 action. 3 4
